description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen computer monitor with a slim, rectangular display and a matte black finish. The front features a wide, flat screen bordered by a thin bezel, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The rear of the monitor is slightly contoured, with a central support column connecting to a V-shaped stand that provides stability. The stand is angular and robust, made of the same dark material as the monitor, and extends outward for balance. No physical buttons or ports are visible on the front, sides, or rear in these views, suggesting a minimalist design. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some internal metal components for structural support.
description: A sleek, matte black flat-screen computer monitor with a thin bezel and a sturdy V-shaped stand. The design is minimalist, with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_0: The monitor is seen from the side, highlighting its slim profile and the angular V-shaped stand extending backward and forward.
description_view_1: The rear view shows the contoured back panel, central support column, and the full V-shaped stand, with no visible ports or buttons.
description_view_2: Another side view, mirroring view 0, emphasizing the thinness of the display and the stand's structure.
description_view_3: The front view displays the wide, flat screen with a thin bezel and the V-shaped stand splayed out beneath the display.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and matte black, with no visible texture or decorative elements. It appears uniform in thickness on all sides and has sharp, squared corners.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a V-shaped, angular base made of matte black material, extending both forward and backward for stability. It is fixed and does not show visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
